name: Honeywell International
analysis: HON has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 8% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry $227.4200, stop $203.4648, target $299.2856 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
